svg.text: SIBA Backdoor Detection Pipeline using Grad-CAM Analysis

g.text: • Both models attend to object features
For clean images: ΔHclean = GradCAM(fbd, x) − GradCAM(fclean, x) → F(ΔHclean) → y = 0
For triggered images: ΔHtrig = GradCAM(fbd, x+δ) − GradCAM(fclean, x+δ) → F(ΔHtrig) → y = 1
where F(·) extracts 30 features from heatmap difference
and δ is the SIBA trigger pattern (sparse & invisible)

svg.text: SIBA: Sparse and Invisible Backdoor Attack | Grad-CAM: Gradient-weighted Class Activation Mapping | ResNet-18 on CIFAR-10
